justification: The issue describes a specific crash scenario in `torch.compile` when using the mem-efficient attention backend with non-aligned head dimensions. The error is reproducible and has been closed, indicating it was a bug.
current_state_summary: The issue has been classified as a bug based on the provided description and error details. The probable code areas are related to the inductor backend and self-attention implementations.

related_issues.title: [inductor] `torch.compile` crashes on `conv_transpose2d` with `output_padding` — stride prediction mismatch
torch.compile Inductor crashes on conv2d with bool-cast input and flattened bias
